title: matelea harlingii
intro: Matelea harlingii, a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, is commonly known as a type of tropical vine or twiner. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Matelea harlingii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections. Herbal preparations of Matelea harlingii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
